title: euodia anomala
intro: Euodia anomala, also known as the Chinese angelica tree or Chinese prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Euodia anomala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Euodia anomala is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
